  "findings": [
    "Thermal growth offset was ignored on hot service machinery",
    "Shaft misalignment during operating temperatures",
    "Excessive vibration and premature bearing/seal wear"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Shut down the operating machinery safely under permit",
    "Perform hot alignment checks or calculate thermal growth offsets per API 686",
    "Re-align the machine cold with the correct target offsets",
    "Verify alignment using laser system after thermal stabilization"
  ],
  "rationale": "Ignoring thermal growth offsets on hot service equipment leads to severe shaft misalignment once the machine reaches operating temperature. This causes high vibration, accelerated bearing wear, and potential mechanical seal failure, violating API 686 standards for machinery installation and alignment.",
  "references": [
    "API RP 686 Chapter 4 (Mounting Plate and Alignment)",
    "Laser Alignment System Manuals (Thermal Growth Compensation)"
  ]
}
